reviews.comment:
Solo nafta Ultra. Nunca tienen super. Baños sucios. Atención media. No siempre reciben tarjeta de crédito.

(Translated by Google)
Only premium gasoline. They never have super. Dirty restrooms. Average service. They don't always accept credit cards.

reviews.comment:
Demasiada gente siempre. Muy caro el shopp, te asesinan para café o para comer; es mucho más barato la Petrobras de ahí cerca
.Resto bien.

(Translated by Google)
Always too crowded. The shopping center is very expensive; they charge an arm and a leg for coffee or food. The Petrobras station nearby is much cheaper.
Otherwise, it's fine.

reviews.comment:
Los playeros no tienen muchas ganas de laburar. Siempre está colapsado de gente, un domingo a las 6 de la tarde vino un camion de combustible y dejaron esperando a la gente una hora. Impresentable.

(Translated by Google)
The beach workers aren't very keen on working. It's always jammed with people. One Sunday at 6 p.m., a fuel truck arrived and left people waiting for an hour. Disgraceful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnLTZxZVlBEAE
